item.title: DeepSeek 完成 500 亿融资
item.guid: DeepSeek-完成-500-亿融资
item.description:
According to The Information, DeepSeek has completed its first round of financing, raising a total of over 50 billion yuan, setting a new record for the highest single-round financing to date for domestic large models and even the entire Chinese AI industry. 据 The Information 报道，DeepSeek 已经完成了其首轮融资，募资总额超过 500 亿元人民币，刷新了国产大模型甚至整个中国 AI 行业迄今为止的单轮融资最高纪录。

Among the publicly disclosed investors, Liang Wenfeng himself subscribed for the largest share, contributing 20 billion yuan; Tencent followed with 10 billion yuan; CATL invested 5 billion yuan; JD, NetEase, and IDG Capital each contributed 3 billion yuan. The remaining investors and amounts have not yet been fully disclosed. 在公开披露的出资方中，梁文峰本人认购份额最大，出资 200 亿元人民币；腾讯跟投 100 亿元人民币；宁德时代出资 50 亿元人民币；京东、网易和 IDG 资本各出资 30 亿元人民币。其余投资方及金额尚未全部披露。

It is worth noting that this round of financing adopted an unusual transaction structure: investors must inject funds into a limited partnership managed by DeepSeek CEO Liang Wenfeng, rather than investing directly in DeepSeek itself. 值得注意的是，本轮融资采用了一种不同寻常的交易结构：投资者须将资金注入一个由 DeepSeek CEO 梁文峰管理的有限合伙企业，而非直接投给 DeepSeek 本身。

According to informed sources, this arrangement is to ensure Liang Wenfeng maintains absolute control over the company, and all external investors' shares have a five-year lock-up period during which they cannot be transferred. 据知情人士透露，这是梁文峰确保自己对公司保持绝对控制的安排，同时所有外部投资者的股份设有五年禁售期，期间不得转让。

🔗 Related Reading: Breaking News | DeepSeek completes 50 billion financing, Liang Wenfeng invests 20 billion himself, requires investors to "lock up" for five years 🔗 相关阅读： 突发｜DeepSeek完成500亿融资，梁文锋自掏200亿，要求投资人「锁仓」五年

item.title: 曝苹果 2027 年将发布一大波新品，包括 3 款 iPhone 和带摄像头的耳机
item.guid: 曝苹果-2027-年将发布一大波新品，包括-3-款-iPhone-和带摄像头的耳机
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple plans to launch camera-equipped AirPods by the end of next year, while simultaneously advancing the second-generation foldable iPhone and the iPhone 20th-anniversary model. The report states that this will be one of Apple's larger new product updates in recent years, with related products having entered advanced development stages in recent months. 据彭博社报道，苹果计划在明年底推出配备摄像头的 AirPods，并同步推进第二代折叠屏 iPhone 和 iPhone 20 周年纪念机型。报道称，这将是苹果近年来规模较大的一轮新品更新，相关产品已在近几个月进入高级开发阶段。

    Camera AirPods: Internal codename B798, positioned as Apple's first AI wearable product. Its camera is not used for taking photos or videos, but rather as a computer vision sensor to provide Siri with environmental and object information. The product's appearance is similar to existing AirPods Pro, with the camera located on the earbud stem and equipped with an external indicator light to signal that data is being transmitted to the cloud for processing. The product was originally planned for release this year but was postponed until next year due to delays in AI software and visual model development.

    Second-generation foldable iPhone: Internal codename V78, expected to be released next year, following Apple's launch of its first foldable iPhone in September this year. The report states that this means Apple considers foldable screens an important category requiring annual updates.

    iPhone 20th Anniversary Model: Internal codenames V73 and V74, expected to be released by the end of next year, succeeding this year's iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max, featuring a nearly bezel-less display and curved glass extending to the sides.

    Chips: The second-generation foldable iPhone and the anniversary model are expected to feature 2nm A21 chips; this year's iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max, and the first-generation foldable iPhone will use A20 Pro chips. The standard iPhone 18 is expected to be delayed until next year.

The report also mentioned that Apple is developing smart glasses and AI camera accessories, among other devices. Smart glasses might be launched as early as the end of next year, but the development of camera AirPods is further along. 报道还提到，苹果正在研发智能眼镜和 AI 摄像头挂件等设备，其中智能眼镜最早可能在明年年底推出，但摄像头 AirPods 的开发进度更靠前。

item.title: OpenAI 财报曝光：去年营收 130.7 亿美元，净亏 385.3 亿美元
item.guid: OpenAI-财报曝光：去年营收-130.7-亿美元，净亏-385.3-亿美元
item.description:
Ed Zitron, a veteran US tech columnist and independent media, stated that he reviewed OpenAI's audited financial documents, which show: 美国资深科技专栏自媒体 Ed Zitron 称，其查阅了 OpenAI 经审计财务文件，数据显示：

OpenAI achieved revenue of $13.07 billion last year, with total costs and expenses of $34 billion, resulting in a net loss attributable to the company of $38.53 billion. The Financial Times has independently verified the relevant documents.

The documents show that OpenAI's operating costs last year were $7.5 billion, R&D expenses were $19.18 billion, sales and marketing expenses were $5.73 billion, general and administrative expenses were $1.57 billion, and operating loss was $20.92 billion. 文件显示，OpenAI 去年的营业成本为 75 亿美元，研发费用为 191.8 亿美元，销售与营销费用为 57.3 亿美元，一般及行政费用为 15.7 亿美元，经营亏损为 209.2 亿美元。

In comparison, OpenAI's revenue in 2024 was $3.7 billion, total costs and expenses were $12.48 billion, and the net loss attributable to the company was $5.09 billion. This means its revenue continued to grow last year, but the scale of losses also significantly expanded. 作为对比，OpenAI 2024 年营收为 37 亿美元，总成本与费用为 124.8 亿美元，归属于公司的净亏损为 50.9 亿美元。这意味着其营收在去年继续增长，但亏损规模也明显扩大。

The documents also disclosed some financial transactions between OpenAI and Microsoft. Last year, SoftBank paid OpenAI $867 million, and Microsoft paid $303 million; during the same period, OpenAI paid Microsoft approximately $17.2 billion in service fees, of which $10.59 billion was accounted for as R&D expenses. The report suggests this likely corresponds mainly to model training costs. 文件还披露了 OpenAI 与微软的部分资金往来。去年，软银向 OpenAI 支付 8.67 亿美元，微软支付 3.03 亿美元；同期 OpenAI 向微软支付的服务费用合计约 172 亿美元，其中 105.9 亿美元计入研发费用，报道认为这可能主要对应模型训练成本。

item.title: SpaceX 斥 600 亿美元收购 Cursor
item.guid: SpaceX-斥-600-亿美元收购-Cursor
item.description:
SpaceX announced yesterday that it will acquire Anysphere, the developer of Cursor, in an all-stock transaction. The deal implies an equity valuation of $60 billion for Cursor and is expected to be completed in the third quarter of this year, marking SpaceX's first M&A transaction since its Nasdaq listing last week. SpaceX 昨日宣布将以全股票交易方式收购 Cursor 开发商 Anysphere，交易对 Cursor 的隐含股权估值为 600 亿美元，预计将于今年第三季度完成，这将成为 SpaceX 上周登陆纳斯达克后的首笔并购交易。

Upon completion of the transaction, Anysphere will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of SpaceX. Reuters stated that this deal will help SpaceX's xAI strengthen its presence in the AI programming market. SpaceX also announced that it will subsequently release AI models on Cursor and launch xAI's programming agent, Grok Build. 交易完成后，Anysphere 将成为 SpaceX 的全资子公司。路透社称，这笔交易将帮助 SpaceX 旗下 xAI 加强在 AI 编程市场的布局。SpaceX 还表示，之后将在 Cursor 上发布 AI 模型，并推出 xAI 的编程智能体 Grok Build。

As of the close, SpaceX reported $201.80, up 4.83%, an increase of $9.30 from the previous trading day's closing price of $192.50; during the session, it touched a high of $225.64 and a low of $195.13. Based on this closing price, SpaceX's market value is approximately $2.66 trillion. 截至收盘，SpaceX 报 201.80 美元，涨 4.83%，较前一交易日收盘价 192.50 美元上涨 9.30 美元；盘中最高触及 225.64 美元，最低为 195.13 美元。按该收盘价计算，SpaceX 市值约为 2.66 万亿美元。

item.title: iPhone 18 标准版据称将配 12GB 内存，以支持更强 Siri 模型
item.guid: iPhone-18-标准版据称将配-12GB-内存，以支持更强-Siri-模型
item.description:
According to KB Securities and DigiTimes, Apple plans to equip the standard iPhone 18 with 12GB of unified memory to support stronger on-device Siri models and system-level dictation capabilities. KB Securities 和 DigiTimes 消息称，苹果计划让标准版 iPhone 18 配备 12GB 统一内存，用于支持更强的端侧 Siri 模型和系统级听写能力。

Previously at WWDC 2026, when Apple introduced Siri AI, it stated that more natural Siri voice and higher accuracy global dictation both require 12GB of memory. The iPhone 17, due to its 8GB memory, cannot run this set of stronger models, while the iPhone Air, iPhone 17 Pro, and iPhone 17 Pro Max meet the requirements. 此前在 WWDC 2026 上，苹果介绍 Siri AI 时称，更自然的 Siri 语音和更高准确度的全局听写都需要 12GB 内存。iPhone 17 因 8GB 内存无法运行这组更强模型，iPhone Air、iPhone 17 Pro 和 iPhone 17 Pro Max 则满足要求。

KB Securities stated that Apple has requested RAM suppliers to increase the supply of LPDDR5X chips required for the next-generation iPhone and will continue to procure mobile DRAM from Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron. KB Securities 称，苹果已要求 RAM 供应商增加下一代 iPhone 所需的 LPDDR5X 芯片供应，并会继续向三星、SK 海力士和美光采购移动 DRAM。

Regarding pricing, reports suggest that Apple may absorb the memory costs itself, not passing the price increase on to consumers, so the starting price for the standard iPhone may remain at $799. 价格方面，报道称苹果可能自行吸收内存成本，不把涨价传导给消费者，因此标准版 iPhone 起售价仍可能维持 799 美元。

The iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max, and foldable iPhone Ultra are expected to be released in the fall of 2026, while the iPhone 18, iPhone Air 2, and iPhone 18e are anticipated to launch in the first half of 2027. iPhone 18 Pro、iPhone 18 Pro Max 和折叠屏 iPhone Ultra 预计在 2026 年秋季发布，iPhone 18、iPhone Air 2 和 iPhone 18e 则预计在 2027 年上半年推出。

item.title: 支付宝 AI 版上线，智能体「阿宝」右滑直达万种服务
item.guid: 支付宝-AI-版上线，智能体「阿宝」右滑直达万种服务
item.description:
On June 16, the AI version of Alipay was officially launched, featuring the built-in AI agent 'Abao'. Users can swipe right to enter the new interface and access tens of thousands of lifestyle services within a single chat box. The new version has currently started invitation-based testing and will gradually be rolled out to all users. 6 月 16 日，AI 版支付宝正式推出，内置 AI 智能体「阿宝」，用户向右滑动即可进入全新界面，在单一对话框内访问上万种生活服务。新版本目前已启动邀请测试，将逐步向全部用户开放。

The new interface has been significantly streamlined, retaining only two functional pages: 'Abao' and 'Assets'. Users can describe their needs using natural language, and Abao can directly match service entry points, covering daily scenarios such as provident fund inquiries, charging station location, home appliance repair appointments, sending express deliveries, ride-hailing, and ordering food, reducing cross-page navigation steps. 新版界面经过大幅精简，仅保留「阿宝」与「资产」两个功能页。用户通过自然语言描述需求，阿宝可直接匹配服务入口，涵盖公积金查询、充电桩定位、家电维修预约、寄快递、打车、点餐等日常场景，减少跨页面跳转步骤。

Regarding fund management, Alipay explicitly reserves financial control to the user. All operations involving fund changes or payments require personal confirmation, and Abao will not autonomously use account funds. Asset details, originally dispersed across functions like Yu'e Bao and Xiao He Bao, are now unified and integrated into a separate 'Assets' page. 资金管理方面，支付宝将财务控制权明确保留给用户。所有涉及资金变动或支付的操作均须本人确认，阿宝不会自主动用账户资金。原本分散于余额宝、小荷包等功能中的资产明细，统一整合至独立的「资产」页面。

Official information indicates that both new and old versions will be retained simultaneously, allowing users to switch freely based on their usage habits. Alipay also plans to launch an Agent open platform for developers, merchants, and service providers, enabling partners to access the AI agent ecosystem without additional development. 官方信息显示，新旧两个版本将同时保留，用户可根据使用习惯自由切换。支付宝还计划推出面向开发者、商家与服务商的 Agent 开放平台，合作伙伴无需额外开发即可接入 AI 智能体生态。

item.title: 微信支付「AI 专属卡」最快本周上线
item.guid: 微信支付「AI-专属卡」最快本周上线
item.description: According to Cailian Press, WeChat Pay is collaborating with Tencent's intelligent agent product WorkBuddy to test AI payment features, planning to launch an 'AI Exclusive Card' in WeChat Wallet. The spending limit of this card is determined by the user's top-up amount, and the payment authorization scope can be controlled by the user. Payments initiated by the intelligent agent still require user password verification. 据财联社报道，微信支付正联合腾讯智能体产品 WorkBuddy 测试 AI 支付功能，计划在微信钱包中上线「AI 专属卡」。该卡的消费上限由用户充值金额决定，支付授权范围可由用户管控，智能体发起支付仍需要用户验密确认。

item.title: 理光 GR 系列国行再涨价
item.guid: 理光-GR-系列国行再涨价
item.description:
Yesterday, Ricoh Camera China's official WeChat account released a notice regarding the adjustment of the GR series' official suggested retail prices, stating that due to recent increases in raw material procurement prices and significant rises in manufacturing and logistics costs, the official suggested retail prices for the GR series of compact digital cameras will be adjusted starting from July 1, 2026. 昨天，理光相机中国公众号发布 GR 系列官方建议零售价调整通知，称因近期原材料采购价格上涨、制造与物流成本大幅攀升，将自 2026 年 7 月 1 日起调整紧凑型数码相机 GR 系列官方建议零售价。

Specifically, the adjusted prices are: RICOH GR IV 9799 yuan, GR IV HDF 10399 yuan, GR IV Monochrome 13799 yuan, GR IIIx 7499 yuan, GR IIIx HDF 8299 yuan, GR IIIx Urban Edition 7999 yuan. 具体来看，调整后的价格为：RICOH GR IV 9799 元，GR IV HDF 10399 元，GR IV Monochrome 13799 元，GR IIIx 7499 元，GR IIIx HDF 8299 元，GR IIIx Urban Edition 7999 元。

item.title: 李想谈汽车行业「发布会越来越多」：一款车能开好几场，但用户耐心有限
item.guid: 李想谈汽车行业「发布会越来越多」：一款车能开好几场，但用户耐心有限
item.description:
Li Xiang, CEO of Li Auto, posted on Weibo yesterday, directly pointing out the phenomenon of 'press conference inflation' in the automotive industry: the number of press conferences continues to increase, but the information density of each event is getting lower and lower. 理想汽车 CEO 李想昨日在微博发文，直指汽车行业存在「发布会通胀」现象：发布会数量持续增加，但每场活动的信息密度却越来越低。

He wrote that a car can have several press conferences, from warm-up, unveiling, pre-sale, launch, to facelift, and 'users' patience is limited'. 他写道，一款车从预热、亮相、预售、上市到改款，可以拆出好几场发布会，而「用户的耐心是有限的」。

If not holding this press conference means users would miss out on something important, then it should be held; if holding it doesn't bring more valuable information, then it shouldn't exist.

He stated, 'I'd rather users feel they haven't seen enough than make them think, "Oh, here we go again?"' Regarding the upcoming Li Auto L8 press conference, Li Xiang said the plan is to 'explain everything in just one session'. 他表示，「宁愿用户觉得没看够，也不想让用户觉得『怎么又来了？』」。关于即将到来的理想 L8 发布会，李想称计划「只开一场就讲透」。

item.title: 微软：典型 AI 查询耗电不超过微波炉运行 2 秒，用水低于一滴
item.guid: 微软：典型-AI-查询耗电不超过微波炉运行-2-秒，用水低于一滴
item.description:
Microsoft recently published a blog post, citing research from the journal Joule, which indicates that sending a typical text query to a large language model consumes approximately 0.16 to 0.60 watt-hours of electricity. 微软日前发布博文，援引《Joule》期刊研究指出，向大型语言模型发送一次典型文本查询，耗电量约为 0.16 至 0.60 瓦时。

Converted to a daily reference, this is equivalent to a 1000-watt microwave oven running for 0.6 to 2 seconds, or a 40-watt computer running for 15 to 60 seconds. Compared to figures cited in previous literature and media, this result is 4 to 20 times lower. 换算为日常参照，相当于 1000 瓦微波炉运行 0.6 至 2 秒，或一台 40 瓦电脑运行 15 至 60 秒。与此前文献和媒体所引数字相比，这一结果低出 4 至 20 倍。

Regarding water usage, the study, under conservative assumptions, estimated that the cooling water for each typical query is approximately 0.0 to 0.067 milliliters, with a median equivalent to about 1/100 of a teaspoon, less than the volume of a single drop of water. Microsoft stated that this figure is expected to decrease further with the continued promotion of zero-water data center designs. 用水方面，研究在保守假设下估算，每次典型查询的冷却用水约为 0.0 至 0.067 毫升，中位数约相当于 1/100 茶匙，低于一滴水的体积。微软表示，随着零用水数据中心设计的持续推广，该数字预计还将进一步下降。

The study suggests that the main reason for previous overestimations of AI energy consumption by external parties is that related measurements failed to reflect the overall operational efficiency of systems under large-scale deployment. The research was jointly conducted by Microsoft AI for Good Lab, Microsoft's sustainability department, and the Azure team. 研究认为，外界此前高估 AI 能耗的主要原因在于，相关测量未能体现大规模部署下系统的整体运行效率。该研究由 Microsoft AI for Good Lab、微软可持续发展部门与 Azure 团队联合开展。

item.title: 7 月起电动车强制一键物理断电
item.guid: 7-月起电动车强制一键物理断电
item.description:
According to Sina Auto, starting July 1st, two mandatory national standards related to electric vehicle safety will officially come into effect. The "Electric Vehicle Safety Requirements" (GB18384—2025) and "Safety Requirements for Power Batteries for Electric Vehicles" (GB38031—2025) will take effect simultaneously. 据新浪汽车报道，7 月 1 日起，两项涉及电动汽车安全的强制性国家标准将正式实施。《电动汽车安全要求》（GB18384—2025）和《电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求》（GB38031—2025）届时将同步生效。

The new national standard for electric vehicle safety for the first time explicitly defines the "one-button power-off" device as a physical power-off device, requiring the physical disconnection of the high-voltage circuit between the entire vehicle's high-voltage circuit or drive system and the rechargeable energy storage system, completely replacing the previous software-controlled power-off method. 电动汽车安全新国标首次将「一键断电」装置明确定义为物理断电装置，要求实现整车高压回路或驱动系统与可充电储能系统之间高压回路的物理断开，彻底取代此前依赖软件控制的断电方式。

The standard also stipulates that when the vehicle is stationary and not charging or discharging, the driver must be able to trigger this function with a single action (tap or long press) to improve the reliability and timeliness of accident rescue. 标准还规定，车辆在静止非充放电工况下，驾驶员须能通过单一动作（点触或长按）触发该功能，以提升事故救援的可靠性和时效性。

The adjustments to the new national battery standard focus on upgrading test conditions and safety judgment criteria. Technical requirements have been adjusted from the previous "provide thermal event alarm signal 5 minutes before fire or explosion" to "no fire, no explosion (still requires alarm), and smoke does not cause harm to occupants," indicating an overall improvement in safety benchmarks. 电池新国标的调整则集中于测试条件与安全判定标准的升级。技术要求从此前的「着火、爆炸前 5 分钟提供热事件报警信号」，调整为「不起火、不爆炸（仍须报警），烟气不对乘员造成伤害」，整体安全基准有所提升。

The new national standard adds a bottom impact test to assess the battery's protective capability after impact; it also adds a safety test after fast charging cycles, requiring an external short-circuit test after 300 fast charging cycles, with results needing to meet the no fire, no explosion requirements. 新国标新增底部撞击测试，考查电池底部受到冲击后的防护能力；同时新增快充循环后安全测试，要求完成 300 次快充循环后进行外部短路测试，结果须满足不起火、不爆炸的要求。

item.title: 高通 CEO 安蒙：AI Agent 会成为新的应用入口
item.guid: 高通-CEO-安蒙：AI-Agent-会成为新的应用入口
item.description:
Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon stated yesterday in an interview with CNBC's "The Tech Download" that Qualcomm is advancing over 40 new AI device designs, preparing for the wave of agents in consumer electronics. 高通 CEO 克里斯蒂亚诺·安蒙 (Cristiano Amon) 昨日接受 CNBC《The Tech Download》采访时表示，高通正在推进 40 多款新型 AI 设备设计，为消费电子里的智能体 (Agent) 浪潮做准备。

Amon said these device forms include jewelry, headphones with cameras, brooches, and watches, with the core idea being to have wearables constantly accompany users, perceive their surroundings, and allow users to invoke agent conversations at any time. 安蒙说，这些设备形态包括珠宝、带摄像头的耳机、胸针和手表，核心是让穿戴设备始终伴随用户、感知周围环境，并让用户随时调用智能体对话。

He believes that agents will be the next stage after digital assistants like Siri or Gemini , capable of performing longer and more complex tasks across applications and services. 他认为， 智能体会成为 Siri 或 Gemini 等数字助手之后的下一阶段 ，能够跨应用和服务执行更长、更复杂的任务。

He gave an example, saying that AI agents can directly retrieve bank transaction details, so users don't have to open a banking app and search layer by layer. Amon's judgment is that applications will not disappear but will change form: "AI agents will become the new applications." 他举例说，AI 智能体可以直接调取银行交易记录细节，用户不必打开银行 App 再逐层查找。安蒙的判断是，应用不会消亡，但会改变形态：「AI 智能体将成为新的应用。」

Amon also stated that he is optimistic about smart glasses, with current annual shipments reaching tens of millions of units, potentially rising to hundreds of millions in the coming years, growing into a consumer electronics category comparable in scale to smartphones. 安蒙还称，他看好智能眼镜，当前年出货量已达数千万副，未来几年可能升至数亿副，并成长为与智能手机相近规模的消费电子类别。

item.title: 💡 奥特曼：AI 已从根本上改变创业逻辑
item.guid: 💡-奥特曼：AI-已从根本上改变创业逻辑
item.description:
In a recent conversation at Stanford University, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman stated that AI has fundamentally changed the logic of founding startups, and the entrepreneurial methodology he taught in 2014 is now outdated. 在斯坦福大学的一场最新对话中，OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）表示，AI 已经从根本上改变了创办初创公司的逻辑，他在 2014 年讲授的那套创业方法论如今已经过时。

Altman taught the CS-183 "How to Start a Startup" course at Stanford in 2014, and OpenAI was founded thereafter. He admitted that if he were to teach the course again, the content would change dramatically, because the practices of top startups today are very different from a few years ago, and no one has yet adequately explained "how to start a startup now." 奥特曼曾于 2014 年在斯坦福开设 CS-183「如何创业」课程，OpenAI 则在此后成立。他坦言，如果重新讲授这门课，内容将发生巨大变化，因为顶级初创公司当下的做法与几年前已大不相同，而目前还没有人很好地诠释「现在应该如何创业」。

In his view, the biggest change lies in the shift of productivity sources—cheap and scalable tokens are replacing expensive human labor, becoming the core driving force for startups. 在他看来，最大的变化在于生产力来源的转移——廉价且可规模化的 token 正在取代昂贵的人力，成为初创公司的核心驱动力。

Now, you only need to bear affordable token costs to accomplish what a startup team of 100 top engineers could do.

The level of ambition you can undertake, the speed of action, the efficiency of progress, and the volume of tasks you can handle simultaneously have all undergone a complete transformation.

He also warned that entrepreneurs should no longer dwell on obvious ideas. If an idea is obvious enough to oneself, it often is to many others as well; the real opportunities lie in directions that were "completely impossible" before the widespread adoption of automated programming. 他同时提醒，创业者不应再纠结于显而易见的点子。如果一个想法对自己足够显而易见，那么它对很多人往往也是如此；真正的机会在于那些在自动化编程普及之前「完全不可能」实现的方向。

Altman predicts that in the coming years, companies supported by only a few individuals will emerge, capable of creating multi-trillion-dollar markets . 奥特曼预计，未来几年将出现仅由少数几个人支撑、却能创造数万亿美元市场的公司 。

item.title: vivo X Fold6 定档下周五
item.guid: vivo-X-Fold6-定档下周五
item.description:
Yesterday, vivo officially announced that its foldable flagship, the vivo X Fold6, is scheduled for official release on June 26th (next Friday). 昨天，vivo 官宣折叠屏旗舰 vivo X Fold6 定档 6 月 26 日（下周五）正式发布。

In terms of configuration, the X Fold6 will be equipped with the Dimensity 9500 processor, making it the first foldable phone to feature this processor. The product reservation page shows four storage specifications: 12GB + 256GB, 12GB + 512GB, 16GB + 512GB, and 16GB + 1TB, with color options including Blue Cave, Salt Lake, Polar Night, and Black Gold. 配置方面，X Fold6 将搭载天玑 9500 处理器，成为首款搭载该处理器的折叠屏手机。商品预约页显示有 12GB + 256GB、12GB + 512GB、16GB + 512GB、16GB + 1TB 四种存储规格，配色包括蓝洞、盐湖、极夜和黑金。

In terms of imaging, the vivo X Fold6 will be equipped with a Blueprint × Samsung HPB 200-megapixel main camera, with a sensor size of 1/1.4 inches, an aperture of f/1.68, and support for CIPA 4.5 professional-grade anti-shake; the periscope telephoto will be a Blueprint × Sony LYT-602, and will support optional vivo Zeiss teleconverter G2. 影像上，vivo X Fold6 将配备蓝图 × 三星 HPB 2 亿像素主摄，传感器尺寸 1/1.4 英寸、光圈 f/1.68，并支持 CIPA 4.5 专业级防抖；潜望长焦为蓝图 × 索尼 LYT-602，并支持选配 vivo 蔡司增距镜 G2。

item.title: 千问发布 Qwen-Robot，三款模型覆盖导航、操作与物理预测
item.guid: 千问发布-Qwen-Robot，三款模型覆盖导航、操作与物理预测
item.description:
The Qwen team yesterday released the Qwen-Robot Suite, a set of embodied AI foundation models designed specifically for the physical world, consisting of three parts: the navigation model Qwen-RobotNav, the manipulation model Qwen-RobotManip, and the world model Qwen-RobotWorld. 千问团队昨日发布 Qwen-Robot Suite，这是一套专为物理世界设计的具身智能基础模型组合，由导航模型 Qwen-RobotNav、操作模型 Qwen-RobotManip 和世界模型 Qwen-RobotWorld 三部分构成。

  • Qwen-RobotNav: Unifies four types of navigation tasks: instruction following, target search, target tracking, and autonomous driving, trained with 15.6 million samples. VLN-CE RxR success rate is 76.5%, NAVSIM score is 91.4 PDMS, and it has been zero-shot deployed on Unitree Go2 quadruped robots; Qwen-RobotNav：统一指令跟随、目标搜索、目标追踪和自动驾驶四类导航任务，以 1,560 万条样本训练。VLN-CE RxR 成功率 76.5%，NAVSIM 得分 91.4 PDMS，已零样本部署于宇树 Go2 四足机器人；
  • Qwen-RobotManip: Uses an 80-dimensional unified state-action representation to be compatible with various robot forms, with all training data from open-source origins, totaling over 38,100 hours (including human-robot transfer synthetic data). LIBERO-Plus success rate is 91.4%, ranked first in the RoboChallenge Table30 v1 general track, an improvement of 20% over the previous best; Qwen-RobotManip：以 80 维统一状态-动作表示兼容多种机器人形态，训练数据全部来自开源来源，合计超 38,100 小时（含人-机迁移合成数据）。LIBERO-Plus 成功率 91.4%，RoboChallenge Table30 v1 通用赛道排名第一，较此前最优提升 20%；
  • Qwen-RobotWorld: Uses natural language as a unified action interface, covering over 20 robot forms, trained with 8.6 million video-text pairs. Ranked first in EWMBench (motion fidelity 33% higher than runner-up), and both WorldModelBench and PBBench are at the top among open-source models. Qwen-RobotWorld：以自然语言为统一动作接口，覆盖 20 余种机器人形态，依托 860 万视频-文本对训练。EWMBench 排名第一（运动保真度超亚军 33%），WorldModelBench 和 PBBench 均居开源模型首位。

All three models adopt a language-first interface and can be called as physical tools by upper-level planners. 三个模型均采用语言优先接口，可被上层规划器作为物理工具调用。

item.title: Seedance 2.0 Mini 上线，成本降低约 50%
item.guid: Seedance-2.0-Mini-上线，成本降低约-50%
item.description:
ByteDance Volcano Engine's Volcano Ark Experience Center has launched the Seedance 2.0 Mini video generation model and plans to open API services soon. Officially, Seedance 2.0 Mini is 2 times faster than Seedance 2.0 Fast, with output quality comparable to Seedance 2.0 Fast. 字节跳动火山引擎旗下火山方舟体验中心已上线 Seedance 2.0 Mini 视频生成模型，并计划近期开放 API 服务。官方称，Seedance 2.0 Mini 比 Seedance 2.0 Fast 快 2 倍，输出质量与 Seedance 2.0 Fast 相当。

Regarding pricing, Volcano Engine announced: image-to-video at 0.023 yuan / thousand tokens, video-to-video at 0.014 yuan / thousand tokens; calculated at 720P specification, the cost of generating a one-second video is about 0.5 yuan, about half the cost of Seedance 2.0 Standard Edition. 价格方面，火山引擎公布的定价为：图生视频 0.023 元 / 千 token，视频生视频 0.014 元 / 千 token；按 720P 规格计算，单秒视频生成成本约 0.5 元，较 Seedance 2.0 标准版降低约一半。

item.title: 小米 MiMo Claw 正式版上线，Token 消耗较同类产品降低 40%-60%
item.guid: 小米-MiMo-Claw-正式版上线，Token-消耗较同类产品降低-40%-60%
item.description:
Xiaomi officially released the cloud-based lightweight product Xiaomi MiMo Claw official version yesterday, pre-installed with the MiMo-V2.5-Pro flagship model deeply adapted to the OpenClaw framework, natively compatible with the MCP tool calling protocol, equipped with millions of ultra-long contexts, focusing on low-threshold experience of MiMo models and AI agent capabilities. 小米昨日正式发布云端轻量化产品 Xiaomi MiMo Claw 正式版，预置与 OpenClaw 框架深度适配的 MiMo-V2.5-Pro 旗舰模型，原生适配 MCP 工具调用协议，配备百万级超长上下文，主打低门槛体验 MiMo 模型与 AI 智能体能力。

According to official sources, relying on the MTP three-layer decoding architecture, the full-link task inference throughput efficiency is increased by about 3 times in the OpenClaw standard agent workflow test; in the ClawEval benchmark test, the model's task completion rate (Pass³) reached 63.8%, and token consumption was reduced by about 40%-60% compared to similar products under the same task effect. 官方称，依托 MTP 三层解码架构，在 OpenClaw 标准智能体工作流测试中，全链路任务推理吞吐效率提升约 3 倍；在 ClawEval 基准测试中，该模型任务达标率（Pass³）达 63.8%，同等任务效果下 Token 消耗较同类产品降低约 40%-60%。

MiMo Claw also collaborates with Kingsoft Office, supporting Word, Excel, PPT, and PDF four major formats, over 95% of document types, integrating AI generation, online preview, and real-time editing, and supporting custom instructions and built-in templates for document generation. MiMo Claw 还联动金山办公，支持 Word、Excel、PPT、PDF 四大格式、超 95% 文档类型，打通 AI 生成、在线预览与实时编辑环节，并支持自定义指令与内置模板生成文档。

Regarding limited-time subscription pricing, the first special offer is 14.9 yuan/month, and the limited-time offer is 19.9 yuan/month, 233.8 yuan/year. 限时订阅定价方面，首次特惠为 14.9 元/月，限时优惠为 19.9 元/月、233.8 元/年。

item.title: 招商银行与 MiniMax 合作推出「运通工程师信用卡」
item.guid: 招商银行与-MiniMax-合作推出「运通工程师信用卡」
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, China Merchants Bank recently launched exclusive AI benefits for its Express Engineer Credit Card, with MiniMax as the partner. After new users meet the criteria, they can choose one of three packages: 据界面新闻报道，招商银行近日为运通工程师信用卡上线专属 AI 权益，合作方为 MiniMax。新户达标后可从三种套餐中任选其一：

1 month Token Plan Max, 2 months Token Plan Plus, or a combination of 1 month MaxClaw Basic and 1 month Token Plan Plus. All plans support calling the full range of MiniMax models, including the latest MiniMax M3.

It is worth noting that Kimi also recently announced the launch of a similar "AI-native credit card," where cardholders' consumption points can be redeemed for a certain form of Kimi computing power quota. 值得注意的是，Kimi 前不久也宣布推出类似的「AI 原生信用卡」，持卡人的消费积分可兑换一定形式的 Kimi 算力额度。

item.title: QoderWork 上线意识功能，给 AI 助手加入记忆、反思和技能进化
item.guid: QoderWork-上线意识功能，给-AI-助手加入记忆、反思和技能进化
item.description:
Alibaba's desktop intelligent agent tool QoderWork yesterday launched the "Consciousness" feature, consisting of three parts: memory, reflection, and skill evolution. The goal is to enable AI assistants to retain user preferences, organize long-term information, and distill repetitive tasks into reusable skills during cross-session collaboration. 阿里旗下桌面智能体工具 QoderWork 昨日上线「意识」功能，由记忆、反思和技能进化三部分组成，目标是让 AI 助手在跨会话协作中保留用户偏好、整理长期信息，并把重复任务沉淀为可复用技能。

  • Memory: Daily conversations first enter short-term memory, valuable information across sessions is promoted to long-term memory, and organized by user identity, work rules, recent tasks, and interaction preferences; memories are stored locally as Markdown text, which users can view, modify, and delete. 记忆：日常对话先进入短期记忆，跨会话有价值的信息晋升为长期记忆，并按用户身份、工作规则、近期任务和交互偏好组织；记忆以 Markdown 文本存放在本地，用户可以查看、修改和删除。
  • Reflection: After a session ends, the system decides whether to initiate reflection based on indicators such as user intent depth, conversation length, task complexity, and tool invocation count, used to propose additions, mergers, or corrections to long-term memory; a snapshot is taken before each reflection, and out-of-bounds actions will be rolled back. 反思：会话结束后，系统根据用户意图深度、对话长度、任务复杂度、工具调用次数等指标决定是否启动反思，用于提出长期记忆新增、合并或修正建议；每次反思前会做快照，越界动作会回滚。
  • Skill Evolution: When AI repeatedly handles similar tasks, it can propose skill suggestions, accompanied by trigger words, template key points, and parameter constraints, with the user deciding whether to adopt, ignore, or reject them. 技能进化：AI 在反复处理同类任务时，可提出技能建议，附带触发词、模板要点和参数约束，由用户决定采纳、忽略或驳回。

Qoder states that reflection and skill evolution fork light quantum sessions from the main session via Fork Session, reusing the original context prefix, with prompt cache hit rates stably above 99%. The additional cost of the consciousness system is controlled within 5% of the main conversation's total overhead, supporting both automatic and manual methods. Qoder 称，反思和技能进化通过 Fork Session 从主会话分叉出轻量子会话，复用原始上下文前缀，prompt cache 命中率稳定在 99% 以上，意识系统额外成本控制在主对话总开销 5% 以内，支持自动和手动两种方式。

item.title: 百灵发布 Ling & Ring 2.6 技术报告，开源面向 Agent 工作流的万亿级模型
item.guid: 百灵发布-Ling-&-Ring-2.6-技术报告，开源面向-Agent-工作流的万亿级模型
item.description:
Bailing Large Model officially released the "Ling & Ring 2.6 Technical Report" yesterday, systematically disclosing the technical details of this series of models in terms of architecture, pre-training, post-training, and inference infrastructure. Ling-2.6-flash, Ling-2.6-1T, and Ring-2.6-1T have been open-sourced successively. 百灵大模型昨日正式发布《Ling & Ring 2.6 技术报告》，系统公开该系列模型在架构、预训练、后训练及推理基础设施方面的技术细节。Ling-2.6-flash、Ling-2.6-1T 和 Ring-2.6-1T 已于此前陆续开源。

    Architecture: Adopts a hybrid linear attention architecture combining Lightning Attention and MLA in a 7:1 ratio, reducing long sequence computational complexity from O(n²) to O(n), expanding the context window to 256K, with a total pre-training volume of approximately 9.2T tokens.

    Token Efficiency: Ling-2.6-1T's token efficiency in inference tasks is approximately 4 times higher than Ling-2.0-1T; Ling-2.6-flash achieves a decoding throughput 4.3 times that of GLM-4.5-Air under 4×H20 deployment.

    Complex Inference: Ring-2.6-1T xhigh scored 95.78 points in AIME 2026 and 66.18 points in ARC-AGI-2, reported as the best among similar open-source weight models.

    Agent Capability: Ring-2.6-1T high scored 87.60 points in PinchBench, 63.82 points in ClawEval (first among open-source weight models), and 74.00 points in SWE-bench Verified.

    KPop Algorithm: Replaces fixed-ratio masking with symmetric binary KL divergence, increasing the SWE-bench Verified solution rate from 70.8% to 76.28%.

Currently, the Bailing 2.6 series base and post-training checkpoints have been open-sourced, and the complete technical report has been released simultaneously. 目前，百灵 2.6 系列 base 与 post-training checkpoints 已开源，完整技术报告同步发布。

item.title: 星巴克再携周杰伦，推出五款 SHAKE 冰摇新品
item.guid: 星巴克再携周杰伦，推出五款-SHAKE-冰摇新品
item.description:
Starbucks once again teamed up with brand ambassador Jay Chou to launch five new products with "SHAKE Iced Shaken" as the summer theme, covering two major categories: Iced Shaken Americano and Iced Shaken Tea. 星巴克再次携手品牌大使周杰伦，以「SHAKE 冰摇」为夏日主题推出五款新品，覆盖冰摇美式和冰摇茶两大品类。

New products include Bergamot Lemon Grapefruit Iced Shaken Americano, Passion Fruit Peach Iced Shaken Americano, Yuzu Jasmine Mojito Iced Shaken Tea, Pineapple Coconut Iced Shaken Tea, and Pomegranate Berry Popping Boba Iced Shaken Tea. Among them, Iced Shaken Tea uses jasmine tea base for the first time, which is made with a "100 jin tea embryo + 150 jin jasmine flowers" scenting process. 新品包括佛手柑柠柚冰摇美式、百香果桃桃冰摇美式、柚香茉吉托冰摇茶、菠萝椰椰冰摇茶和红石榴莓莓爆珠冰摇茶。其中冰摇茶首次使用茉莉花茶底，茶底采用「100 斤茶胚 + 150 斤茉莉鲜花」窨制工艺。

The Bergamot Lemon Grapefruit Iced Shaken Americano and Passion Fruit Peach Iced Shaken Americano were launched on June 16, and the three Iced Shaken Teas were launched on June 23. Starbucks will also launch merchandise such as lyric cups, themed tote bags, lyric cup holders, and stainless steel lyric ice cubes, and will conduct themed experiences at its Guangzhou Shamian store, Beijing Sanlitun Taikoo Li store, and over 130 lightly decorated stores nationwide. 佛手柑柠柚冰摇美式和百香果桃桃冰摇美式于 6 月 16 日上市，三款冰摇茶于 6 月 23 日上市。星巴克还将上线歌词杯、主题拎袋、歌词杯提、不锈钢歌词冰块等周边，并在广州沙面店、北京三里屯太古里店和全国 130 多家轻装饰门店开展主题体验。

item.title: 市场监管总局试点电子证照核验，治理「幽灵外卖」
item.guid: 市场监管总局试点电子证照核验，治理「幽灵外卖」
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the State Administration for Market Regulation is carrying out a pilot program for electronic license verification, targeting issues such as "ghost takeaways" and cracking down on merchants illegally joining online platforms by using forged or misappropriated licenses or fabricating business addresses. 据央视新闻报道，市场监管总局正在开展电子证照核验试点，针对「幽灵外卖」等乱象，打击商户利用伪造、套用证照或虚构经营地址等方式违法入网。

The pilot program relies on the national unified electronic business license system to promote digital closed-loop management of entry qualification review: when catering operators join the network, the legal representative completes business entity identity authentication and authorization through the electronic business license mini-program; 试点依托全国统一的电子营业执照系统，推动入驻资质审核数字化闭环管理：餐饮经营者入网时，由法定代表人通过电子营业执照小程序完成经营主体身份认证和授权；

After the platform obtains authorization, it can retrieve electronic business licenses and food business permits in real-time; data between regulatory authorities, platforms, and merchants will also be interconnected for qualification verification, information checking, and daily supervision. 平台获得授权后，可实时调取电子营业执照和食品经营许可证；监管部门、平台与商户之间的数据也会被打通，用于资质校验、信息核查和日常监管。

In May this year, Shanghai launched the nation's first online catering electronic license verification application, covering the "application-comparison-authorization-display" process from merchant application to platform display of licenses. The State Administration for Market Regulation stated that the next step will be to improve the construction of the electronic business license system and data docking, and promote license authorization management, compliant public display of licenses, and dynamic synchronization of license information. 今年 5 月，上海已推出全国首个网络餐饮电子证照核验应用，覆盖从商户申请到平台亮证的「申请-比对-授权-亮证」流程。市场监管总局表示，下一步会完善电子营业执照系统建设和数据对接，推动证照授权管理、合规公示证照生成和证照信息动态同步。

item.title: 无广告、拒 AI 内容、高版税，这家法国音乐平台正借 Spotify 争议加速增长
item.guid: 无广告、拒-AI-内容、高版税，这家法国音乐平台正借-Spotify-争议加速增长
item.description:
According to WIRED, French streaming music service Qobuz has reached 1.2 million monthly active users, up from approximately 500,000 a year ago. Last year, the platform's streaming revenue grew by 45.7% year-on-year, far exceeding the industry's overall 8.8%; the United States is its largest market, contributing about one-third of its revenue. 据《WIRED》报道，法国流媒体音乐服务 Qobuz 月活跃用户已达 120 万，一年前这一数字约为 50 万。去年，该平台流媒体营收同比增长 45.7%，远超行业整体的 8.8%；美国为其最大市场，贡献约三分之一收入。

In terms of royalties, Qobuz's independently audited average settlement price per play is $0.01873, which is about four to six times Spotify's publicly disclosed range ($0.003 to $0.005). 版税方面，Qobuz 经独立审计核验的每次播放平均结算价为 0.01873 美元，约为 Spotify 公开区间（0.003 至 0.005 美元）的四至六倍。

Notably, its user growth has been driven by multiple rounds of Spotify-related controversies: in January last year, "Mood Machine" was published criticizing Spotify's business model; in October of the same year, immigration enforcement ads appearing on the Spotify platform sparked backlash on social media, with US General Manager Dan Mackta calling that day the biggest user growth day in Qobuz US history. 值得注意的是，其用户增长受多轮 Spotify 相关争议驱动：去年 1 月，《Mood Machine》出版批评 Spotify 商业模式；同年 10 月，Spotify 平台出现的移民执法广告在社交媒体引发反弹，美国区总经理 Dan Mackta 称当日为 Qobuz 美国区有史以来用户增长最多的一天。

In February this year, Qobuz released an AI charter, prohibiting the inclusion of music created 100% by generative AI , and has already begun screening newly uploaded tracks and historical catalogs from recent years. Mackta stated that the proportion of AI content in some detected batches was as high as 40%. Qobuz aims to increase its share of the paid streaming market to 1%. 今年 2 月，Qobuz 发布 AI 宪章， 禁止收录 100% 由生成式 AI 创作的音乐 ，并已对新上架曲目及近年历史曲库展开筛查。Mackta 称，部分被检测批次中 AI 内容比例高达 40%。Qobuz 目标是将付费流媒体市场占有率提升至 1%。

item.title: 真人版《魔女宅急便》剧集进入开发，BBC Studios 与角川参与
item.guid: 真人版《魔女宅急便》剧集进入开发，BBC-Studios-与角川参与
item.description:
According to Variety, BBC Studios Kids & Family, UK production company Wheel in Motion, and Japan's Kadokawa will jointly develop a live-action TV series of "Kiki's Delivery Service." This marks the first time Eiko Kadono's original work has been adapted into a live-action television project. 据《Variety》报道，BBC Studios Kids & Family、英国制作公司 Wheel in Motion 与日本角川将共同开发《魔女宅急便》真人电视剧。这是角野荣子原作首次被改编为真人电视项目。

The project is currently in the development stage, with plans to produce 10 episodes, each approximately half an hour long, primarily adapted from the first volume of the six-volume novel series. The story still revolves around 13-year-old witch Kiki, who leaves home for the port city of Koriko to establish her own delivery service and make new friends. 项目目前处于开发阶段，计划制作 10 集，每集约半小时，主要改编自六卷本小说系列的第一卷。故事仍围绕 13 岁魔女琪琪展开，她离家前往港口城市 Koriko，建立自己的送货服务，并结识新的朋友。

Irena Brignull will serve as the screenwriter; she previously worked on "The Boxtrolls," "Skellig," and the Netflix version of "The Little Prince." The original novel was published in Japan in 1985 by Fukuinkan Shoten, and Studio Ghibli adapted it into an animated film directed by Hayao Miyazaki in 1989; the new live-action series also coincides with the original series' 40th anniversary. Irena Brignull 将担任编剧，她此前参与过《盒子怪》《Skellig》和 Netflix 版《小王子》。原作小说 1985 年由福音馆书店在日本出版，吉卜力工作室 1989 年将其改编为宫崎骏执导的动画电影；新的真人剧集也对应原作系列 40 周年。

item.title: 印度 AI 工作室宣布重制经典民间故事 IP《Vikram Betal》
item.guid: 印度-AI-工作室宣布重制经典民间故事-IP《Vikram-Betal》
item.description:
According to Variety, Historyverse, a cultural brand under Indian content company Collective Studios, announced the development of the AI series "Vikram Betal." 据《Variety》 报道，印度内容公司 Collective Studios 旗下文化厂牌 Historyverse 宣布开发 AI 剧集《Vikram Betal》。

This project is adapted from the classical Indian story collection "Baital Pachisi," which tells stories through a narrative framework where the spirit Betal tells tales to King Vikramaditya, concluding with moral riddles, a tradition that has been spread among the Indian populace for centuries. Educational institution Birla Open Minds will serve as the knowledge partner for this project. 这一项目改编自印度古典故事集《Baital Pachisi》，讲述精灵 Betal 向国王 Vikramaditya 讲述故事并以道德谜题作结的叙事框架，在印度拥有数百年的民间传播基础。教育机构 Birla Open Minds 将担任该项目的知识合作伙伴。
